                <p class="f16res mb-4 ">

		const targets = [];

		while (walker.nextNode()) {
			const node = walker.currentNode;
			if (/^\s*photo_[1-5]-/.test(node.textContent)) {
				targets.push(node);
			}
		}

		targets.forEach(function (node) {
			node.textContent = '';
		});
	});
	</script>
